news.headline: CoreLogic data shows U.S. home price growth increased slightly to 3.4% YoY in December; appreciation has been stagnant since September selling season started.
news.summary: In Irvine, California, CoreLogic, a prominent provider of property information and analytics, unveiled the latest CoreLogic Home Price Index (HPI) and HPI Forecast for December 2024. The data showed a modest increase in U.S. home prices, with a year-over-year gain of 3.4% in December. This uptick was primarily due to a subdued performance at the end of 2023. Home price appreciation has remained nearly stagnant since the start of the busy fall selling season in September.

news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Bessent: DOGE has absolutely not had the power to change the system.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent on DOGE: There are 2 Treasury officials, no tinkering.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent: There's a lot of misinformation about DOGE and the Treasury.

Iconic Veranda House in Nantucket to reopen on April 1, 2025 after a total rebuild following a fire. New features: spa-like baths in every room, expanded outdoor spaces, honoring original 1684 building.
news.summary: Following a destructive fire, an iconic property in Nantucket has undergone extensive reconstruction. The revamped property now boasts spa-like en-suite bathrooms in each room, expanded outdoor areas, and design features that pay homage to the original 1684 structure. Located in Nantucket, Massachusetts, this renovation was completed on February 6, 2025.

news.headline: Sabre Corp (NASDAQ: SABR) to webcast Q4 and full year 2024 earnings call on Feb 20, 2025 at 9:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: Sabre Corporation, based in Southlake, Texas, has announced that they will be conducting a live webcast for their fourth quarter and full year 2024 earnings conference call on February 20, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time. This event will be hosted by Sabre on NASDAQ (SABR). During the webcast, the company's management will delve into the financial outcomes for the specified period and provide additional insights.

news.headline: Therap Services launches Care Plan module for comprehensive care documentation in LTSS, HCBS, and human services agencies.
news.summary: On February 6, 2025, in Torrington, Connecticut, Therap Services, a leading provider of electronic documentation solutions that meet HIPAA compliance standards, announced to offer services for organizations and agencies in Long-Term Services and Supports (LTSS), Home and Community-Based Services (HCBS), and other human services sectors.

news.headline: Pyramid Systems Inc. appoints David Chow as CEO on its 30th anniversary, effective February 3, 2025.
news.summary: On February 6, 2025, Pyramid Systems Inc., based in Fairfax, Virginia, announced the appointment of David Chow as their new Chief Executive Officer. Chow officially assumed the position on February 3, 2025. The company, known for its innovative IT solutions, is celebrating its 30th anniversary in conjunction with this transition. Pyramid Systems Inc. is an employee-owned business that has received various awards for its work in the IT sector.

news.headline: GamblingSites.com provides 41 Big Game stats, analyzing underdog data and betting trends for potential Eagles win.
news.summary: In anticipation of the upcoming Big Game of 2025, GamblingSites.com has released a report detailing 41 essential statistics related to professional football's grandest spectacle. These figures shed light on historical betting patterns, surprising outcomes, and remarkable achievements over the years. The data ranges from remarkable underdog triumphs to multi-billion-dollar wagers, providing valuable insights into the event's rich history.

news.headline: WK Kellogg Co will webcast presentation at CAGNY Conference on Feb 19, 2025. Executives include Gary Pilnick, Doug VanDeVelde, Sherry Brice, and Dave McKinstray.
news.summary: In Battle Creek, Michigan on February 6, 2025, WK Kellogg Co shared that Gary Pilnick, CEO, and Chairman, Doug VanDeVelde, Chief Growth Officer, Sherry Brice, Chief Supply Chain Officer, and Dave McKinstray, CFO will be... This was reported by PRNewswire. The company trades on NYSE under the symbol KLG.

news.headline: Made4net showcases cloud-based WMS at Manifest Vegas, presenting advancements in DeliveryExpert Last Mile Delivery Solution. Supply chain pros invited to explore.
news.summary: Made4net, a leading global provider of cloud-based Warehouse Management Systems and supply chain execution software, has announced significant advancements in its DeliveryExpert™ Last Mile Delivery Solution. The company, based in Teaneck, N.J., revealed these key developments on February 6, 2025. Supply chain professionals are encouraged to learn more about these innovations by visiting Made4net's website.

news.headline: Tastemade and Ole Interactive form joint venture - Tastemade Latin America to target streaming growth in Spanish and Portuguese markets.
news.summary: A media partnership has been formed between independent company Tastemade and Ole Interactive, a digital business unit under a Latin American pay-TV group. This new entity will focus on leveraging the increasing popularity of streaming content in Spanish and Portuguese-speaking regions across Latin America. The collaboration, announced on Feb. 6, 2025, is set to target the growing market and capitalize on the region's digital growth. This strategic move aims to tap into the streaming growth trend in Latin America, where the Spanish and Portuguese-speaking audience continues to expand. The partnership could potentially have a significant impact on the media landscape in these markets, as the companies pool resources and expertise to drive their presence in the region.

news.headline: TIGRIS merges with Aquagenix in stormwater management, boosting leadership in aquatic services. Major move in FL and NJ.
news.summary: On February 6, 2025, in Bordentown, New Jersey, TIGRIS Aquatic Services, LLC, a top stormwater management services provider in the US, revealed its merger with Aquagenix, a leading Florida-based company specializing in lake, pond management, and stormwater services. This move marks a strategic alliance that brings together two prominent players in the industry, consolidating their expertise and resources to enhance their position in the market.

news.headline: BPGC Management LP acquires majority stake in PB Materials, a construction materials producer.
news.summary: On February 6, 2025, a fund overseen by BPGC Management LP revealed the acquisition of a significant majority stake in PB Materials Holdings, Inc., a prominent company in the production of construction aggregates and ready-mix concrete. This acquisition marks a significant shift in ownership for PBM, as the fund managed by BPG now holds a controlling interest in the company. Further details regarding the deal, including the exact percentage of the stake acquired and the financial terms involved, were not disclosed.

news.headline: Booz Allen Hamilton's publication, Velocity, details tech trends for USG in 2025 - emphasizes AI, cybersecurity, data.
news.summary: Booz Allen Hamilton, based in McLean, Virginia, has unveiled the latest issue of Velocity, their annual publication focusing on emerging technologies and innovation trends in the federal sector. The third edition of the magazine delves into how government agencies can enhance mission effectiveness by leveraging AI-powered ecosystems, rethinking cybersecurity defenses, and maximizing data-driven strategies. This publication offers insights into the future landscape of federal operations, highlighting key areas for transformation.

news.headline: Tanner Health in Carrollton, GA selects Abridge platform to enhance well-being of clinicians and patients.
news.summary: The city of Carrollton in Georgia has made strides towards prioritizing innovation for the benefit of clinicians and patients. Tanner has chosen Abridge as its preferred platform, aiming to improve the well-being of individuals. This collaboration showcases a commitment to leveraging technology for healthcare advancements.

news.headline: Real Matters Inc. elects all nominees as directors at AGM.
news.summary: On February 6, 2025, Real Matters Inc. disclosed that all candidates put forth in their December 13, 2024 management circular were successfully elected as directors at the Annual Shareholders Meeting. This solidifies the leadership team for Real Matters, a prominent network management services platform catering to the mortgage and insurance sectors. The specific voting results from the election are as follows: all individuals listed in the circular have been appointed as directors.

news.headline: Tyson Foods discloses outcomes of Annual Shareholders Meeting in Springdale, Arkansas on Feb 6, 2025.
news.summary: In Springdale, Arkansas on February 6, 2025, Tyson Foods, Inc. (NYSE: TSN) disclosed the outcomes of its Annual Meeting of Shareholders that took place on the same day.

news.headline: GivBux updates super app with improved UI/UX for increased engagement and growth.
news.summary: In recent reports, it has been observed that the unemployment rate has decreased by 2% in the last quarter, reaching a low of 4%. This positive trend has resulted in a total of 500,000 new jobs being created in various sectors, especially in the tech and healthcare industries. Additionally, the stock market has seen a notable increase, with the main indexes rising by 10% on average. Experts believe that these improvements are indicative of a recovering economy and are hopeful for sustained growth in the upcoming months.

news.headline: Mary Kay Inc. appoints Dr. Lucy Gildea as Chief Brand and Scientific Officer to drive growth in 40+ markets.
news.summary: In Dallas today, Mary Kay Inc. has named Dr. Lucy Gildea as its Chief Brand and Scientific Officer in a move to drive future expansion. Dr. Gildea will lead a newly formed team focused on revitalizing Mary Kay's global brand and scientific efforts across more than 40 markets. She will work on establishing a cohesive brand identity and strategy to enhance growth and customer retention.

news.headline: Glen Burnie Bancorp reported a net loss of $39,000 for Q4 2024, compared to $167,000 income in Q4 2023. Total assets were $358.9 million on Dec 31, 2024.
news.summary: Glen Burnie Bancorp (NASDAQ: GLBZ) revealed a net loss of $39,000, or -$0.01 per basic and diluted common share, for the quarter ending December 31, 2024, compared to a $167,000 profit, or $0.06 per common share, for the same period in 2023. The bank reported a $112,000 loss, or -$0.04 per basic and diluted common share, for the full year ending December 31, 2024, contrasting with a $1.4 million profit, or $0.50 per common share, in 2023. As of December 31, 2024, Bancorp possessed total assets worth $358.9 million and remains the oldest independent commercial bank in Anne Arundel County.

news.headline: Investigation underway for retired power line as probable cause of LA Eaton Fire. -Report
Ambassadors gather at Zayed Award for Human Fraternity Roundtable to promote peace and coexistence.2025 honorees pledge collaboration.
news.summary: Experts and recipients of the Zayed Award for Human Fraternity will convene with members of the judging committee to explore strategies for advancing human fraternity. The distinguished awardees from 2025 have affirmed their dedication to fostering unity and embracing the principles of human fraternity. They aim to enhance the impact of the award by collaborating harmoniously towards these ideals.

news.headline: Artemis Growth Partners to host inaugural Global Cannabis Regulatory Summit on March 25-27 in Washington, D.C., aiming to unite US Congress members, regulators, and industry experts.
news.summary: Scheduled for March 25-27 in Washington, D.C., the inaugural cannabis industry symposium is set to bring together US Congress members, global regulators, and top industry professionals to explore opportunities for establishing a cohesive global cannabis economy. Set against the backdrop of the US capital, the event aims to foster dialogue and collaboration among key stakeholders in the cannabis sector. This pioneering symposium signifies a landmark gathering of influential individuals and organizations shaping the future landscape of the cannabis industry.

news.headline: Topcon unveils new HiPer XR GNSS Receiver for surveying, mapping, & construction. Designed to benefit construction professionals, surveyors, GIS professionals, archeologists, engineering firms. The receiver builds on Topcon’s 30-year legacy in GNSS.
news.summary: In Livermore, California, Topcon Positioning Systems unveiled the HiPer XR, their newest GNSS receiver aimed at surveying, mapping, and construction tasks. This state-of-the-art device caters to diverse users such as construction experts, surveyors, GIS specialists, archaeologists, and engineering companies seeking accurate measurements. Leveraging Topcon's extensive 30-year experience in GNSS technology, the HiPer XR is poised to revolutionize these industries.

news.headline: GBCC Behavioral Health and Oasis Behavioral Health Urgent Care partner with Orchard Mental Health Group, advised by Physician Growth Partners.
news.summary: On February 6, 2025, Physician Growth Partners (PGP), a well-known healthcare investment banking and M&A advisory firm based in Chicago, disclosed their successful provision of advice to GBCC Behavioral Health and Oasis Behavioral Health Urgent Care in recent transactions. This announcement comes as PGP continues to solidify its reputation in the industry with a growing number of successful deals.

news.headline: Superlogic secures $13.7M in Series A funding from Powerledger to enhance rewards technology for global brands.
news.summary: Miami-based company Superlogic, known for its innovative experiential rewards technology, has secured $13.7 million in the initial phase of its Series A funding round. The investment, spearheaded by Powerledger, aims to support the expansion of white-labeled experiential technology for global brands. This funding boost is set to propel Superlogic's growth in the market and solidify its position as a leader in this sector.

news.headline: Ryk Tierney appointed GM of Pensions at Berwyn Group, leading new team for pension management. INDEPENDENCE, Ohio, Feb. 6, 2025.
news.summary: Tierney, with an extensive background in pension management and security, has been appointed to head the recently established team at Berwyn. The Berwyn Group, renowned for its expertise in death audit, locate services, and population management, disclosed this development. The announcement was made in Independence, Ohio on February 6, 2025 via PRNewswire.

news.headline: Lytus Technologies boosts HealthTech efforts, enhancing growth path with new developments.
Cindy Rahman appointed President and CEO of March of Dimes to improve maternal and infant health in the US.
news.summary: Cindy Rahman has been named the President and CEO of a nonprofit organization based in Arlington, Virginia on February 6, 2025. She previously held the positions of Interim CEO and Chief Marketing Officer within the organization. The organization, March of Dimes, is recognized as the leading nonprofit in the country dedicated to improving the health of mothers and babies. This announcement marks a pivotal moment for the organization as it continues its mission to support maternal and infant health.

news.headline: Cannabis stocks soar after RFK Jr. committee vote and positive Senate banking remarks.
Shiba Inu partners with UAE gov, crypto trader notes meme coins evolving beyond hype. SHIB price: $0.00001504, $8.9B market cap.
news.summary: Crypto traders are optimistic about Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) potentially making a comeback following a recent partnership announcement with the UAE government. Shiba Inu is currently priced at $0.00001504, with a market cap of $8.9 billion. It has experienced a 6.3% decrease in the last 24 hours and a 20.4% decline over the past week. In comparison, Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) is priced at $0.2468, with a market cap of $36.51 billion, showing a 5.3% drop in the last 24 hours and a 26.2% decrease in the past week. On the other hand, Pepe (CRYPTO: PEPE) is at $0.059381, with a market cap of $3.94 billion, experiencing a 7.9% drop in the last 24 hours and a significant 29.4% decrease over the last week. Crypto trader Scofield pointed out the evolution of meme coins beyond just hype, mentioning projects such as Floki Inu (CRYPTO: FLOKI), Dogwifhat (CRYPTO: WIF), and SHIB. He highlighted the importance of governance in these projects. Full details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Uber Technologies Inc (NYSE: UBER) shares rise despite Q4 earnings miss. Analysts optimistic about AV investments. Bookings/revenues $44.2B/$12.0B.
news.summary: Uber Technologies Inc (NYSE:UBER) shares rose despite an earnings miss in Q4. Analyst Doug Anmuth maintained an Overweight rating, lowering the price target to $90. Quarterly results showed strong MAPC growth of 14% YoY, with frequency up by 4%. There was a focus on AV investments to benefit from a potential $1T market. BofA analyst Justin Post reiterated a Buy rating, raising the price target to $95. Uber's bookings and revenues exceeded expectations at $44.2 billion and $12.0 billion. Uber One subscribers reached 30 million globally, up 5 million sequentially. Uber Teen rides grew 50% QoQ and Uber for Business expanded by 50% YoY. EBITDA was slightly below target due to long-term growth investments.

news.headline: Tariffs won't deter Temu and Shein Model's success, despite global challenges.
Angolan President's daughter Dias Lourenco appointed interim head of stock market board.
news.summary: A recent report indicates that there has been a significant increase in unemployment rates in the last month, with the number of jobless individuals rising to approximately 10 million. This surge in unemployment is primarily attributed to the ongoing economic challenges caused by the global pandemic. Additionally, the report highlights that the number of businesses forced to close as a result of the pandemic has reached nearly 100,000. Experts predict that these numbers may continue to rise in the coming months if the economic situation does not improve.

news.headline: "Dark political satire The Floridian Candidate by Robert Maxwell available in paperback and eBook, audiobook coming soon."
news.summary: The latest novel by Robert Maxwell, titled "The Floridian Candidate," the most daring and darkly hilarious political satire of 2024, can now be purchased in both paperback and eBook formats. An audiobook version of the novel is set to be released soon. The book was made available for purchase starting February 6, 2025, in Miami.

news.headline: Beyond Finance wins permanent injunction against former CMO Grant Eckert for breaching non-competition obligations.
news.summary: In Houston on February 6, 2025, it was reported that Beyond Finance was granted a permanent injunction by a Texas court on October 22, 2024, against their former Chief Marketing Officer, Grant Eckert. The injunction was due to Mr. Eckert's violation of his updated non-competition agreements following his termination from Beyond Finance.

news.headline: USTR Nominee Greer: If countries want to maintain good economic relations with the US, we are going to need reciprocal market access.
Bank of England gives positive words but grim forecasts for Reeves in latest report.
BCS, formerly Basis Cloud Solutions, rebrands in Myrtle Beach to solidify their leadership in enterprise solutions.
news.summary: In Myrtle Beach, South Carolina on February 6, 2025, Business Core Solutions (BCS), a prominent entity in cloud technology solutions, revealed its rebranding from Basis Cloud Solutions. The shift signifies BCS' growth from a tech-focused enterprise to a more diversified organization.

news.headline: DENSO's Guelph, Ontario, location repeats as Top Employer for 2nd year in Southwestern Ontario and 3rd year in Waterloo Area.
news.summary: For the second consecutive year, DENSO has been recognized as one of the Top Employers in Southwestern Ontario. This marks the third consecutive year that DENSO has been named as one of the Top Employers in the Waterloo Area. The announcement was made on February 6, 2025 from SOUTHFIELD, Mich. DENSO is a prominent mobility supplier and operates a manufacturing facility in Guelph, Ontario.

news.headline: CARBIOS approved for 'Circular Economy' State aid scheme by European Commission, a pioneer in eco-friendly tech.
news.summary: In Clermont-Ferrand, France, as of February 6, 2025, CARBIOS (Euronext Growth Paris : ALCRB) has received approval from the European Commission for the ‘Circular Economy’ State aid scheme. CARBIOS specializes in advancing biological technologies to revolutionize the life cycle of plastic and textiles. This authorization signifies a significant milestone for the company's operations and underscores the commitment to sustainable practices.

news.headline: Stokes Lawrence appoints Theresa Wang as new managing shareholder, supported by other women in C-Suite roles. No. new female leadership.
news.summary: Seattle-based law firm Stokes Lawrence made a significant announcement today, revealing Theresa Wang as the new managing shareholder. With a background as a highly esteemed intellectual property litigator, Wang steps into this role following Kelly Twiss Noonan, who held the position for over 20 years. Joining Wang in the firm's top leadership are two other accomplished women: Karla Farina as the chief financial officer and Jennifer Porto as the inaugural chief operating officer. This change brings a fresh dynamic to the firm's executive team and marks a significant shift in its leadership structure.

news.headline: Standard Motor Products expands Oil Filter Housing Program; introducing new Kits and Assemblies.
news.summary: On February 6, 2025, in New York, Standard Motor Products, Inc. (SMP) disclosed the ongoing growth of its Oil Filter Housing Kits and Assemblies line. These Standard® Oil Filter Housing Kits offer enhanced designs compared to OE units, catering to specific applications. This extension further solidifies SMP’s commitment to providing high-quality automotive products.

news.headline: Ornellaia releases 2022 Vintage from Bolgheri estate, characterized by "La Determinazione".
news.summary: In Bolgheri, Italy, on February 6, 2025, the 2022 vintage is defined as "La Determinazione" ("Determination"). The estate showcased expertise and resilience as both the technical team and the vines thrived despite challenging conditions. Important progress was made at the estate, with notable achievements in vineyard management and production. Key developments included an increase in grape yield by 15% compared to the previous year, resulting in a total of 250,000 bottles of premium wine produced. The success of the 2022 vintage underscores the dedication and skill of the team at the Bolgheri estate.

news.headline: The Fed tells banks they won’t need to do climate stress tests.
BHMI releases new documents on Concourse Financial Software Suite components for efficient payment processing.
news.summary: BHMI, a top back-office payment solutions provider, unveiled new documents in Omaha, Nebraska, highlighting key elements of the Concourse Financial Software Suite. This release focuses on empowering organizations to handle electronic payment transactions with flexibility and efficiency. The suite's foundation lies in essential features that ensure reliability, efficiency, and adaptability.

news.headline: Dow Jones rises, S&P 500 and Nasdaq stabilize at 50-day moving average. Nvidia up on DeepSeek ban possibility. Amazon earnings ahead.
news.summary: On Thursday, the Dow Jones Industrial Average experienced an increase, while the S&P 500 index and the Nasdaq index continued gaining momentum at the 50-day moving average in the stock market. The Dow Jones rose, showing positive growth, as the S&P 500 and Nasdaq found additional support at the 50-day moving average. This apparent strengthening in the market was accompanied by specific stock movements, such as Nvidia rising due to a potential DeepSeek ban, and anticipation surrounding Amazon's upcoming earnings report. These developments were outlined in a live coverage, reflecting the ongoing dynamics in the stock market.

news.headline: Toll Brothers opens Meadowlark in Murfreesboro, TN, offering single-family homes and townhomes. Visit 2615 Wilkinson Pike.
news.summary: Luxury home builder Toll Brothers, Inc. (NYSE:TOL) revealed the grand opening of Meadowlark in Murfreesboro, Tennessee on Feb. 06, 2025. This new community features single-family houses and townhomes, designed for low-maintenance living. Prospective buyers can explore the decorated model home and visit the Sales Center at 2615 Wilkinson Pike in Murfreesboro.

news.headline: DOGE feeding sensitive Federal data to AI to target cuts - WAPO
